app.title: 🗼 The Earful Tower
app.subtitle: Local transcription · Speaker diarization · Runs on your machine

settings.names: Speaker names, comma-separated — most talkative first (optional)
settings.preview: Preview mode — seconds (optional, blank = full file)
settings.out_dir: Output folder  (blank = same folder as audio)

formats.txt: Transcript (.txt) — plain text, one line per speaker turn
formats.md: Markdown (.md) — formatted, great for Obsidian / Notion
formats.srt: Subtitles (.srt) — standard subtitle file, works in any player
formats.mkv: Video (.mkv) — audio + scrolling waveform + embedded subtitles
formats.json: JSON (.json) — full segment data with timestamps, for developers

errors.file_not_found: ❌  File not found — check the path
errors.bad_ext: ⚠️  Unexpected file type '{ext}' — ffmpeg will try anyway
errors.names_separator: ❌  Separate speaker names with commas, not semicolons
errors.preview_nan: ❌  Preview seconds must be a whole number
errors.no_formats: ❌  Select at least one output format
